questions.question: Which span name represents an agent run in the GenAI conventions?
questions.explanation: invoke_agent is the canonical name; the agent's name attribute appears in the span name when set.
questions.question_zh: 在 GenAI 约定中，哪个 span 名代表一次 agent 运行？
options_zh: invoke_agent（可选用 gen_ai.agent.name 作为后缀）
questions.explanation_zh: invoke_agent 是规范名；当设置了 agent name 属性时，它会出现在 span 名中。

questions.question: Which three span categories does the GenAI SIG define?
questions.explanation: Model/client (LLM calls), agent (create/invoke), tool (per invocation) are the categories.
questions.question_zh: GenAI SIG 定义了哪三类 span？
questions.explanation_zh: Model/client（LLM 调用）、agent（创建/调用）、tool（每次调用）就是这三类。

questions.question: When does an invoke_agent span use kind CLIENT vs INTERNAL?
options: CLIENT for remote agent services (OpenAI Assistants, Bedrock Agents); INTERNAL for in-process frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, local ReAct)
questions.explanation: Remote agent calls are CLIENT; in-process agent runs are INTERNAL.
questions.question_zh: invoke_agent span 何时使用 CLIENT 而非 INTERNAL kind？
options_zh: 对远程 agent 服务（OpenAI Assistants、Bedrock Agents）用 CLIENT；对进程内框架（LangChain、CrewAI、本地 ReAct）用 INTERNAL
questions.explanation_zh: 调用远程 agent 用 CLIENT；进程内 agent 运行用 INTERNAL。

questions.question: What is the default rule for content capture (inputs and outputs)?
options: Instrumentations SHOULD NOT capture by default; capture is opt-in via gen_ai.* attributes
questions.explanation: Default-off content capture protects PII and secrets; opt-in is explicit.
questions.question_zh: 默认情况下输入和输出内容捕获的规则是什么？
options_zh: Instrumentation 默认不应捕获；通过 gen_ai.* 属性显式开启
只捕获 output，从不捕获 input
questions.explanation_zh: 默认不捕获是为了保护 PII 和密钥；想捕获要显式 opt-in。

questions.question: Which attribute identifies the corpus or store consulted for a retrieval?
questions.explanation: gen_ai.data_source.id labels the RAG corpus or store hit by retrieval.
questions.question_zh: 哪个属性标识检索时使用的语料库或存储？
questions.explanation_zh: gen_ai.data_source.id 标记检索命中的 RAG 语料库或存储。

questions.question: What does the lesson recommend for storing prompt content in production?
options: Capture full prompts on every span as plain text
Store content externally (S3, log store) and record reference IDs on the span instead
questions.explanation: External storage with pointer IDs avoids PII leaking into traces that ops can read.
questions.question_zh: 本课对生产环境保存 prompt 内容有什么建议？
options_zh: 在每个 span 上以纯文本捕获完整 prompt
把内容存到外部（S3、日志存储），span 上只记录引用 ID
在 span 属性里加密 prompt
questions.explanation_zh: 外置存储 + 指针 ID，避免 PII 泄漏到运维都能看到的 trace 中。

questions.question: How do you opt into the experimental stable preview of GenAI conventions?
questions.explanation: The env var pins the experimental conventions so attributes are not silently renamed.
questions.question_zh: 怎么 opt-in 到 GenAI 约定的实验性稳定预览？
options_zh: 编辑 OTel collector 配置
questions.explanation_zh: 这个环境变量把实验性约定钉死，避免属性被悄悄改名。
